task: Browse used Audi cars made before 2015 and sort by lowest price on KBB.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the browsing task on KBB. Evidence shows it navigated to KBB Cars for Sale, applied Max Year = 2014 (which satisfies 'made before 2015'), selected Audi make, ensured Used condition, and set Sort By to 'Price - Lowest'. The final snapshot confirms the page title 'Used Audi Cars for Sale in San Francisco, CA - Kelley Blue Book', active filters 'Used', 'Audi', 'Max 2014', and the sort combobox with 'Price - Lowest' selected.
final_result_response:
Done. KBB is filtered to:

- Used Audi
- Max year 2014, meaning made before 2015
- Sorted by Price - Lowest
- Location currently near 94102

It shows 45 matches.
action_history: Opening Kelley Blue Book: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.kbb.com/');
Opening cars for sale section: await page.locator('e3').click();
Opening max year dropdown: await page.locator('e29').click();
Selecting 2014 as max year: await page.locator('e403').click();
